memory.summary: I could tackle that quick chore for a fast win, but the term project is due Thursday and I'm barely started.

desires: Get the instant dopamine hit of finishing the trivial chore immediately to feel productive without facing the term project's difficulty
Avoid the stress of a potential conflict or delay with my teammates by procrastinating on the hard task until the last minute
Ignore the growing sleep debt and stress levels because the immediate relief of not working feels more valuable than future consequences

goals.description: Complete the trivial quick_chore immediately to get a dopamine hit and feel productive without engaging with the term project.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature craves instant gratification, and my avoidance of conflict means I'm dodging the potential stress of the term project by focusing on an easy 'win' that looks like work but requires no real effort.

goals.description: Spend the rest of the afternoon in leisure (attend event) to avoid the discomfort of starting the hard task now.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon; ignoring the sleep debt and future deadline is worth it for the immediate relief. My academic value is high, but only if it's not painful right now, so I'll push the actual work until later when the pressure forces me.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (instant dopamine win) to avoid term project stress. Short-term relief outweighs sleep debt; avoids conflict with the hard task.
